title: Discounted price for apps not visible on the first pricing screen

posts.author: shalini (shalini jain)
posts.cookedHtml:
Convereted into Feature Request as @kranthi_thoughtflow asked

Hi guys,

We’ve run into a little snag with our “Bird’s Eye View” app. It seems that the discounted amounts aren’t showing on the first screen, which is causing a bit of confusion for our users.

We believe showing the discounted price right on the first screen could significantly improve user experience and potentially boost conversions. Any insights or solutions to make this happen would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!
